plan.designTitle: ADR: Fix Login Page Session Handling
plan.changeStrategy: Fix the session cookie handling in the login page component to properly redirect after authentication.

risks.risk: Session logic is entangled with other auth flows
risks.trigger: Changing cookie handling breaks OAuth or SSO flows

validationPlan.ac: Login page correctly sets session cookie and redirects
validationPlan.verification: Login with valid credentials and confirm redirect to dashboard

steps.title: Fix session cookie handling in LoginPage component
steps.goal: Update the login handler to set httpOnly session cookie before redirect.
steps.description: Modify src/pages/LoginPage.tsx to set the session cookie with httpOnly flag in the login success handler before calling router.push('/dashboard').
steps.acceptanceCriteria: Session cookie is set with httpOnly flag before redirect.

steps.title: Update session middleware to validate cookie format
steps.goal: Ensure the backend session middleware accepts the new cookie format.
steps.description: Modify src/middleware/session.ts to validate the updated session cookie format and reject malformed tokens.
steps.acceptanceCriteria: Session middleware validates new cookie format without breaking existing sessions.
